infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Mowdeck to use the microphone for Spanish dictation.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow Mowdeck to convert speech into text for WhatsApp drafts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Mowdeck to attach before-and-after job photos to service records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Mowdeck to save service evidence photos when needed.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Mowdeck to use the microphone for Spanish dictation.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Mowdeck to convert speech into text for WhatsApp drafts.
